article.title: Uber SDE-2 | Reject
article.content:
Current YOE: 2.8

Phone screen: Given intial position of cars and the max speed they can have find the position at which they can meet. The cars can travel at any speed from 0 to max speed for the car and can move in any direction. The answer can be in decimal. Solved it using binary search.

Onsite:
DSA: Given a number find the next greater number which is a palindrome.

LLD: Apply promotions on an order cart.

HLD: Whatsapp 1:1 message design. Was mostly looking for depth.

HM : Standard questions

Recruiter gave the feedback that it was a close call. Had strong yes in DSA and soft yes in rest 3. Recruiter said a strong yes in any of the rest 3 would have helped my case. Asked to reapply after 5-6 months.

post.content: What was the rating of all your rounds ?
Is this role for message service?

Hi, sorry for that. I was a close call\nHope you get it next time.\nCan you also please share on the LLD round? My recuiter said that it\'s kind of DSA round only, just the implement Twitter timeline, implement an LRU cache etc kind of questions. So it\'s not like a traditional LLD kind of round, we need to use in-memory data structures to write the working code. More details would be appreciable
How to solve the first question ?\nIs there any leetcode equivalent question to it ?
May I ask more details for LLD? Is it OOD? What functionalities to implement. Thanks!
Hi\n\nAfter how many days did you got result ?
What\'s the expectation in LLD/HLD round?
What was the expectation in the LLD round? Full working code(machine coding) or just a standard LLD design with discussion and code for maybe a key module
